description: Cobalt is a personal finance app for web and mobile that aggregates bank, brokerage, transaction, budget, and subscription data. It lets users access and analyze their financial data directly and through AI-assisted workflows.
summary: Cobalt exposes a versioned REST API at `api.cobaltpf.com/v1` with an OpenAPI spec, plus a hosted Streamable HTTP MCP server at `api.cobaltpf.com/api/mcp`; both are authenticated, with API keys for REST and OAuth for MCP.
